tasks.title: Run pre-implementation audit grep commands
tasks.description:
Before touching any code, run all verification greps to baseline the current state.

(1) Count getDb() call sites: `rg 'getDb()' packages/db/src/models/ --type ts --glob '!base.model.ts' -c` — expect ~51.
(2) Count findWithRelations overrides that drop tx: `rg 'findWithRelations' packages/db/src/models/ --type ts -l`.
(3) Count findWithRelations with narrow relations type: `rg 'relations: Record<string, boolean>' packages/db/src/models/ --type ts`.
(4) Verify reference implementations exist: `rg 'DrizzleClient' packages/db/src/models/user/rRolePermission.model.ts`.
(5) Confirm DrizzleClient type is exported from @repo/db: `rg 'DrizzleClient' packages/db/src/index.ts`.
(6) Confirm getClient(tx) exists on BaseModel: `rg 'getClient' packages/db/src/base/base.model.ts`.
(7) Confirm findAll signature (tx is 4th positional): `rg 'findAll' packages/db/src/base/base.model.ts`.
(8) Confirm count signature (tx via options object): `rg 'count\(' packages/db/src/base/base.model.ts`.

Document all results. Fail fast if BaseModel.getClient does not exist — this is a prerequisite from SPEC-058.

Test requirements: No code changes. Record baseline numbers.

subtasks.title: Verify DrizzleClient is exported from @repo/db index
Confirm findAll tx is 4th positional parameter
Confirm count() uses { tx } options object pattern

tasks.title: Document tx threading patterns with code examples
Fix LSP violation in RRolePermissionModel (Phase 0)
tasks.description:
Fix the reference implementation RRolePermissionModel.

File: `packages/db/src/models/user/rRolePermission.model.ts`

Changes required:
1. Change `NodePgDatabase` import → `import type { DrizzleClient } from '@repo/db'` (remove NodePgDatabase import)
2. Fix findWithRelations relations parameter type: `Record<string, boolean>` → `Record<string, boolean | Record<string, unknown>>`
3. Ensure tx parameter is present in findWithRelations and all custom methods
4. Ensure all getDb() calls are already replaced (this is a reference impl — verify first)

Expected signature:
```ts
override async findWithRelations(
  where: WhereClause,
  relations: Record<string, boolean | Record<string, unknown>>,
  tx?: DrizzleClient
): Promise<RRolePermission | null>
```

Test requirements:
- File: `packages/db/src/models/user/__tests__/rRolePermission.model.test.ts` (create if missing)
- Test 1: findWithRelations works without tx (backward compat)
- Test 2: findWithRelations receives and uses tx when provided (mock DrizzleClient)
- Run: `pnpm typecheck --filter @repo/db`

tasks.title: Fix tx propagation in AmenityModel.findWithRelations (Phase 1)
tasks.description:
Apply tx threading to AmenityModel.

File: `packages/db/src/models/accommodation/amenity.model.ts`

Changes:
1. Replace `getDb()` with `this.getClient(tx)` in all methods
2. Fix `findWithRelations` override:
   - Add `tx?: DrizzleClient` as last param
   - Fix relations type: `Record<string, boolean | Record<string, unknown>>`
   - Thread tx to inner `this.findOne(where, tx)` call
3. Remove `getDb` import
4. Add `import type { DrizzleClient } from '@repo/db'`

This is a Phase 1 "simple" model — only findWithRelations override, no custom methods.

Test requirements:
- File: `packages/db/src/models/accommodation/__tests__/amenity.model.test.ts`
- Test 1: `findWithRelations(where, relations)` without tx — returns entity
- Test 2: `findWithRelations(where, relations, tx)` — tx passed to getClient
- Mock `this.getClient` to verify it receives the tx argument

subtasks.title: Fix findWithRelations relations type + add tx param

tasks.title: Fix tx in DestinationModel traversal methods (Phase 4c)
tasks.description:
Apply tx threading to DestinationModel — tree traversal methods batch.

File: `packages/db/src/models/destination/destination.model.ts`

Methods to fix in this task:
1. `findChildren(parentId, tx?)` — replace getDb() with this.getClient(tx)
2. `findDescendants(ancestorId, tx?)` — N+1 recursive pattern: calls itself recursively — thread tx to each recursive call
3. `findAncestors(nodeId, tx?)` — N+1 recursive pattern: calls itself recursively — thread tx
4. `findByPath(path, tx?)` — replace getDb() with this.getClient(tx)

Critical: findDescendants and findAncestors call themselves recursively. tx must be threaded through all recursive calls. Example:
```ts
async findDescendants(parentId: string, tx?: DrizzleClient): Promise<Destination[]> {
  const children = await this.findChildren(parentId, tx);  // thread tx
  const all = [...children];
  for (const child of children) {
    const descendants = await this.findDescendants(child.id, tx);  // thread tx recursively
    all.push(...descendants);
  }
  return all;
}
```

Test requirements:
- File: `packages/db/src/models/destination/__tests__/destination.model.test.ts`
- Test 1: findChildren with tx
- Test 2: findDescendants with tx — verify recursive calls thread tx
- Test 3: findAncestors with tx — verify recursive calls thread tx
- Test 4: findByPath with tx

subtasks.title: Fix findChildren: add tx + replace getDb()
Fix findDescendants recursive: thread tx through all recursive calls
Fix findAncestors recursive: thread tx through all recursive calls
Fix findByPath: add tx + replace getDb()
Write unit tests including recursive tx threading tests

2. `searchWithAttractions(query, options, tx?)` — replace getDb() with this.getClient(tx); N+1: may call findAllByAttractionId internally — thread tx
3. `getAttractionsMap(ids, tx?)` — replace getDb() with this.getClient(tx)
4. `search(query, options, tx?)` — replace getDb() with this.getClient(tx)
5. `countByFilters(filters, tx?)` — replace getDb() with this.getClient(tx)
6. `isDescendant(nodeId, ancestorId, tx?)` — delegate: calls findAncestors(nodeId, tx) — thread tx
7. `findWithRelations(where, relations, tx?)` — fix LSP type + add tx + thread to findOne

Also: remove getDb import, add `import type { DrizzleClient } from '@repo/db'`

Test requirements (continue destination test file from T-028):
- Test each new method with tx
- isDescendant: verify findAncestors called with tx
- searchWithAttractions: verify inner N+1 calls get tx

tasks.title: Run final verification grep commands (Phase 5)
tasks.description:
Run all four spec-mandated verification grep commands — all must return zero results.

```bash
# 1. Zero getDb() calls remain in model subclasses
rg 'getDb\(\)' packages/db/src/models/ --type ts --glob '!base.model.ts'

# 2. Zero narrow relations types (LSP violations)

# 3. Zero getDb imports in fixed files
rg 'import.*getDb.*from' packages/db/src/models/ --type ts --glob '!base.model.ts'

# 4. Zero findAll called with tx as 2nd positional (common mistake)
rg 'this\.findAll\(\{[^}]+\},\s*tx\)' packages/db/src/models/ --type ts
```

If any command returns results: identify the file, go back to the relevant task, and fix.

tasks.title: Run full typecheck on @repo/db package (Phase 5)
tasks.description:
Run TypeScript typecheck on the entire @repo/db package after all model fixes.

```bash
pnpm typecheck --filter @repo/db
```

Expected: zero type errors. If errors exist, fix the offending model before proceeding.

Common typecheck errors to watch for:
- `Type 'X' is not assignable to type 'Record<string, boolean | Record<string, unknown>>'` — LSP violation not fully fixed
- `Expected 3 arguments, but got 4` — findAll called with wrong arity
- `Property 'tx' does not exist on type 'Options'` — count() options type mismatch

Test requirements: `pnpm typecheck --filter @repo/db` must exit 0.

tasks.title: Run full test suite for @repo/db models (Phase 5)
tasks.description:
Run the complete test suite for all model files after all phases are complete.

```bash
pnpm test --filter @repo/db
```

Expected: all tests pass, zero failures, minimum 90% coverage on modified files.

If tests fail:
- Identify which model's tests are failing
- Check if the method signature change broke a test expectation
- Confirm backward compat: all methods still work without tx param

Also check that downstream packages that import model classes still compile:
```bash
pnpm typecheck --filter @repo/service-core
pnpm typecheck --filter apps/api
```

tasks.title: Run biome lint on modified model files (Phase 5)
tasks.description:
Run biome lint on all modified model files to ensure no lint violations.

```bash
pnpm lint --filter @repo/db
# Or targeted:
npx biome check packages/db/src/models/ --write
```

Common biome issues to watch for in this context:
- `noUnusedVariables` — if tx parameter is declared but never used (should be passed to getClient)
- `useDefaultParameterLast` — tx?: DrizzleClient must be the LAST parameter in all method signatures
- Import ordering issues after adding DrizzleClient import
